• Rate limiting - Wikipedia

    In computer networks, rate limiting controls the rate of requests sent or received by a controller.

    en.wikipedia.org

  • Scaling your API with rate limiters

    Stripe uses the token bucket algorithm to throttle API requests fairly across clients.

    stripe.com

  • What is rate limiting? | Cloudflare

    Rate limiting is a strategy for limiting network traffic to prevent abuse.

    cloudflare.com
